# Afrobeats.party

> Afrobeats.party is a curated guide to African and diaspora club culture: Afrobeats, amapiano, events, venues, artist pages, playlists, dance tutorials, and community-oriented pages.

## Canonical site
- Primary origin: https://afrobeats.party/

## Main sections
- `/` — Home: carousels, featured events, clubs teaser, global map preview, team.
- `/music` — Playlists and streaming entry points (YouTube, Spotify, Apple Music).
- `/music/artist/:id` — Artist profile (from `src/data/artists.ts`).
- `/music/artist/:artistId/:songSlug` — Track detail when routed from artist pages.
- `/dance` — Dance curriculum index (Afrobeats, amapiano, and related styles).
- `/dance/:genre/:id` or `/dance/:id` — Individual dance lesson pages with video and metadata.
- `/events` — Festival and party calendar backed by `src/data/events.json`.
- `/event/:slug` — Event detail; slug is ASCII-ish `slugify` of the event title (see `src/lib/slugUtils.ts`).
- `/clubs` — Searchable Afrobeats / amapiano club directory from `src/data/clubs.ts` with map mode.
- `/map` — Global map of artists, clubs, and events with coordinates.
- `/news` — Headlines from an external RSS feed (links leave the site to publishers).
- `/partner`, `/chapters`, `/join`, `/artist-join` — Community and partnership funnels.
- `/careers` and `/careers/:slug` — Role listings from `src/data/job-listings.ts`.
- `/discord` — Discord community link page.

## Machine-readable discovery
- `https://afrobeats.party/sitemap.xml` — Static URL list (update when adding major routes).
- `https://afrobeats.party/robots.txt` — Crawl policy and sitemap pointer.

## SEO and structured data
- Per-route `<title>`, `meta description`, Open Graph, Twitter cards, and JSON-LD are set with `react-helmet` on major pages (see `src/pages/*.tsx` and `src/lib/siteSeo.ts`).
- Default social preview image: `/AfrobeatsDAOMeta.png`.

## Content sources (for fact-checking)
- Venues and festivals should be verified against official venue or promoter sites before treating dates as authoritative; `events.json` includes disclaimers where editions are provisional.

## Contact / publisher
- Branding: Afrobeats.party / Afrobeats DAO community positioning on-site (see footer and organization JSON-LD on the home page).
